translation.name: AbstractProfileDesc
translation.en: These are profiles on resources or data types that describe patterns used by other profiles but cannot be instantiated directly. I.e. instances can conform to profiles *based* on these abstract profiles, but do not declare conformance to the abstract profiles themselves.

translation.name: AbstractProfileName
translation.en: Structures: Abstract Profiles

translation.name: ActivityDefinitionDesc
translation.en: These define activities that can be performed as part of content in this implementation guide.

translation.name: ActivityDefinitionName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Activity Definitions

translation.name: ActorDefinitionDesc
translation.en: The following artifacts define the types of individuals and/or systems that will interact as part of the use cases covered by this implementation guide.

translation.name: ActorDefinitionName
translation.en: Requirements: Actor Definitions

translation.name: CapabilityStatementDesc
translation.en: The following artifacts define the specific capabilities that different types of systems are expected to have in order to comply with this implementation guide. Systems conforming to this implementation guide are expected to declare conformance to one or more of the following capability statements.

translation.name: CapabilityStatementName
translation.en: Behavior: Capability Statements

translation.name: ChargeItemDefinitionDesc
translation.en: Definitions of chargeable costs relevant to the use of this implementation guide.

translation.name: ChargeItemDefinitionName
translation.en: Clinical: Charge Item Definitions

translation.name: CitationDesc
translation.en: Supports referencing artifacts defined in this implementation guide.

translation.name: CitationName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Citations

translation.name: CodeSystemDesc
translation.en: These define new code systems used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: CodeSystemName
translation.en: Terminology: Code Systems

translation.name: ConceptMapDesc
translation.en: These define transformations to convert between codes by systems conforming with this implementation guide.

translation.name: ConceptMapName
translation.en: Terminology: Concept Maps

translation.name: ConditionDefinitionDesc
translation.en: Formal descriptions of conditions and symptoms relevant to the use of this implementation guide.

translation.name: ConditionDefinitionName
translation.en: Clinical: Condition Definitions

translation.name: DataTypeDesc
translation.en: These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: DataTypeName
translation.en: Structures: Data Type Profiles

translation.name: EventDefinitionDesc
translation.en: Defines system and business occurrences that drive a need for data to flow from systems in this implementation guide.

translation.name: EventDefinitionName
translation.en: Behavior: Event Definitions

translation.name: EvidenceDesc
translation.en: Indicates research or other information that justifies or support the information exchange defined in this implemetnation guide

translation.name: EvidenceName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Evidence

translation.name: EvidenceVariableDesc
translation.en: Components of the research that justify or support the information exchange defined in this implementation guide

translation.name: EvidenceVariableName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Evidence Variables

translation.name: ExampleDesc
translation.en: These are example instances that show what data produced and consumed by systems conforming with this implementation guide might look like.

translation.name: ExampleName
translation.en: Example: Example Instances

translation.name: ExampleScenarioDesc
translation.en: These define groups of interrelated examples that demonstrate one or more of the workflows supported by this implementation guide.

translation.name: ExampleScenarioName
translation.en: Example: Example Scenarios

translation.name: ExampleSupportingDesc
translation.en: These are example instances that are not governed by this implementation guide, but which are necessary to support other examples defined in the IG.

translation.name: ExampleSupportingName
translation.en: Example: Example Supporting Instances

translation.name: ExtensionDesc
translation.en: These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: ExtensionName
translation.en: Structures: Extension Definitions

translation.name: GraphDefinitionDesc
translation.en: These define collections of interrelated resources that are useful to pass around as a group.

translation.name: GraphDefinitionName
translation.en: Structures: Graph Definitions

translation.name: LibraryDesc
translation.en: These define logic, asset collections and other libraries as part of content in this implementation guide.

translation.name: LibraryName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Libraries

translation.name: LogicalModelDesc
translation.en: These define data models that represent the domain covered by this implementation guide in more business-friendly terms than the underlying FHIR resources.

translation.name: LogicalModelName
translation.en: Structures: Logical Models

translation.name: MeasureDesc
translation.en: These define measures as part of content in this implementation guide.

translation.name: MeasureName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Measure

translation.name: MessageDefinitionDesc
translation.en: These define the types of messages that can be sent and/or received by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: MessageDefinitionName
translation.en: Behavior: Message Definitions

translation.name: NamingSystemDesc
translation.en: These define identifier and/or code system identities used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: NamingSystemName
translation.en: Terminology: Naming Systems

translation.name: ObservationDefinitionDesc
translation.en: Formal descriptions of types of observations relevant to the use of this implementation guide.

translation.name: ObservationDefinitionName
translation.en: Clinical: Observation Definitions

translation.name: OperationDefinitionDesc
translation.en: These are custom operations that can be supported by and/or invoked by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: OperationDefinitionName
translation.en: Behavior: Operation Definitions

translation.name: OtherDesc
translation.en: These are resources that are used within this implementation guide that do not fit into one of the other categories.

translation.name: PlanDefinitionDesc
translation.en: These define workflows, rules, strategies, or protocols as part of content in this implementation guide.

translation.name: PlanDefinitionName
translation.en: Knowledge Artifacts: Plan Definitions

translation.name: QuestionnaireDesc
translation.en: These define forms used by systems conforming to this implementation guide to capture or expose data to end users.

translation.name: QuestionnaireName
translation.en: Structures: Questionnaires

translation.name: RequirementsDesc
translation.en: The following artifacts describe the specific requirements to be met by systems compliant with the implementation guide.

translation.name: RequirementsName
translation.en: Requirements: Formal Requirements

translation.name: ResourceDesc
translation.en: 'Additional' resources that are not yet published in the FHIR core specification.

translation.name: ResourceName
translation.en: Structures: Additional Resources

translation.name: ResourceProfileDesc
translation.en: These define constraints on FHIR resources for systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: ResourceProfileName
translation.en: Structures: Resource Profiles

translation.name: SearchParameterDesc
translation.en: These define the properties by which a RESTful server can be searched. They can also be used for sorting and including related resources.

translation.name: SearchParameterName
translation.en: Behavior: Search Parameters

translation.name: SpecimenDefinitionDesc
translation.en: Formal descriptions of the types of specimens relevant to the use of this implementation guide.

translation.name: SpecimenDefinitionName
translation.en: Clinical: Specimen Definitions

translation.name: StructureMapDesc
translation.en: These define transformations to convert between data structures used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: StructureMapName
translation.en: Terminology: Structure Maps

translation.name: SubscriptionTopicDesc
translation.en: These define the types of information that can be subscribed to on systems conforming to this this implementation guide.

translation.name: SubscriptionTopicName
translation.en: Behavior: Subscription Topics

translation.name: TerminologyCapDesc
translation.en: Parameters that define the expansion of value sets used within the implementation guide.

translation.name: TerminologyCapName
translation.en: Terminology: Terminology Capabilities

translation.name: TestPlanDesc
translation.en: These test plans are available to verify test coverage for this implementation guide.

translation.name: TestPlanName
translation.en: Testing Artifacts: TestPlans

translation.name: TestScriptDesc
translation.en: These test definitions are available to FHIR test engines to verify systems are conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: TestScriptName
translation.en: Testing Artifacts: TestScripts

translation.name: ValueSetDesc
translation.en: These define sets of codes used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.

translation.name: ValueSetName
translation.en: Terminology: Value Sets
